heading: Reserve active-status lists: eligibility for Reserve promotion
label: 14004 Reserve active-status lists: eligibility for Reserve promotion
text: Except as otherwise provided by law, an officer must be on a reserve active-status list to be eligible under chapter 1405 of this title for consideration for selection for promotion or for promotion.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
